title: callianthemum insigne var. miyabeanum
intro: Callianthemum insigne var. miyabeanum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Callianthemum insigne plant, commonly known as the Japanese alpine forget-me-not or alpine forget-me-not. This delicate, pink-purple flowering plant is native to Japan and is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Callianthemum insigne var. miyabeanum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
